# Drilling Engineering

**Summary**: The technical aspects of drilling wells, including hydraulics and wellbore stability.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] focused on drilling engineering to improve hole cleaning in real-time

## Key Subtopics

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] ['hole cleaning', 'well control', 'drilling hydraulics']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] ['real-time monitoring', 'automated reporting']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The model is validated using real-time data for 12 wells. HCF estimated values from real-time and historical data reflected the actual well condition. ([[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021, p. 14]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] Ensuring efficient cuttings transport in high-angle wells.
